title: Electricmon
description: ElectricMon is a content-rich Cobblemon modpack focused on exploration, progression, and multiplayer adventure. Featuring custom structures, legendary encounters, enhanced world generation, quality-of-life improvements, and immersiv
body:
**Welcome to ElectricMon!** 
ElectricMon is a feature-packed Cobblemon adventure built for players who want more than just a standard Pokémon experience in Minecraft. Explore a massive world filled with custom structures, legendary encounters, immersive progression, enhanced visuals, quality-of-life improvements, and unique Cobblemon-focused content designed to make every journey feel alive.

Whether you want to build a competitive team, hunt rare Pokémon, challenge custom gyms, explore dangerous dimensions, or simply relax with friends and create your dream Pokémon world, ElectricMon delivers a polished and content-rich experience for both casual and hardcore players.

The pack combines exploration, survival, progression, and multiplayer-friendly features while staying centered around the Cobblemon experience. With custom resource packs, enhanced UI, better navigation tools, outbreak systems, research tasks, improved world generation, and legendary structures, every adventure feels fresh and rewarding.

**Features**
- Full Cobblemon gameplay experience
- Custom gyms, legendary monuments, and special structures
- Pokémon outbreaks, research tasks, and progression systems
- Enhanced world generation and exploration
- Performance optimizations for smoother gameplay
- Immersive visuals, animations, shaders, and sound packs
- Multiplayer-friendly quality-of-life improvements
- Navigation tools, minimaps, and waystones
- Cosmetic additions and immersive accessories
- Constantly expanding content and balancing updates

**Core Cobblemon Content**
- Cobblemon
- Cobblemon Research Tasks
- Cobblemon Pokemon Badges
- CobbleLoots
- Cobblemon Outbreaks
- Cobblemon Extra Structures
- CobbleNav
- CobbleStats
- Capture XP
- Recall Beams
- Spawn Notification
- CobbleFurnies
- CobbledGacha Datapack
- Rad Gyms [Cobblemon]
- Legendary Monuments
- MysticMons
- Sirdoof
- Z-A Megas Early
- Eternal

**Exploration & World Generation**
- Biomes O’ Plenty
- Nature’s Compass
- Waystones
- Xaero’s World Map
- Xaero’s Minimap
- Legendary Structures
- Additional Cobblemon Structures

**Building & Decoration**
- Macaw’s Windows
- Accessories
- Accessories Compat Layer
- Immersive Interfaces
- Immersive Interfaces Accessories

**Quality of Life**
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- Better Advancements
- Inventory Management
- Chat Heads
- Skin Layers 3D
- WATUT

**Performance & Optimization**
- ModernFix
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- Lithium
- Sodium
- ImmediatelyFast
- Dynamic FPS

**Libraries & Dependencies**
- Architectury API
- Balm
- TerraBlender
- Resourceful Lib
- Forge Config API Port
- Yet Another Config Lib (YACL)
- Polymer
- Melody
- CoroUtil
- TimCore

**Visuals, Audio & Resource Packs**
- Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack
- Cobblemon Anime Poké Ball SFX Pack
- Cobblemon Minimap Icons
- Insanity Shader

ElectricMon is designed to be the ultimate Cobblemon experience — blending exploration, progression, immersion, and multiplayer fun into one carefully curated modpack. Catch, battle, explore, and build your own Pokémon adventure in a world that constantly rewards discovery.

Start your journey, challenge powerful trainers, uncover legendary secrets, and become the ultimate Pokémon master in ElectricMon.
